description_long: This is a brown ceramic cup with a rounded body and a smoothly curved handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features a stylized graphic of a tree with cleavers and green leaves, accompanied by the text 'CAÇADOR DE ENTS' and 'AÇOUGUE VEGANO' in green. Decorative green leaf motifs wrap around the lower portion of the cup, adding a natural, artistic touch. The cup's surface is glossy, reflecting light and giving it a polished appearance. The interior is also brown and appears to be filled with a dark liquid, likely coffee or tea. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping, and the cup is of a typical size for hot beverages.
description: A glossy brown ceramic cup with a handle, decorated with a tree and cleaver motif, green leaf patterns, and text on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative motif, text, and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered, no visible motif or text, only partial green leaf patterns.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, showing green leaf patterns and a plain brown surface.
description_view_3: Angled rear view with no handle visible, mostly showing the brown surface and green leaf patterns.
